<!-- Thanks for contributing to Fairy Fox Stories. PRs target `dev`, never `main`. -->

**What this changes**
A new book? A new chapter on an existing one? A fix? Briefly, what and why.

**If it's a book (or chapter)**
- [ ] Ships/updates a complete public `blueprint.md`
- [ ] Honours its form (`notes/reference/craft/forms.md`)
- [ ] First-person, real flawed main character (not a hollow insert)
- [ ] Universe / characters / cities tagged so the mesh links up

**Checks**
- [ ] `npm test` passes (integrity check green)
- [ ] Previewed in the browser (`bundle exec jekyll serve`)
- [ ] Specific files staged (no `git add -A`); targets `dev`
